query:
SELECT id, roomNo, status, currentRound, rounds, maxPlayers, currentPlayers, createdAt 
FROM arenaRooms 
WHERE roomNo = '90001' OR id = 90001
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
